summary: Comprehensive two-tier test suite with strong coverage of core requirements. Unit tests (MatrixGenerator.Tests.ps1) thoroughly exercise cartesian product expansion, include/exclude rules, max-parallel, fail-fast, max-size validation, JSON output, and error handling. Integration harness (harness.ps1) is sophisticated: creates isolated git repos per fixture, runs actual `act` workflows, validates specific output markers (MATRIX_OK/FAIL, sizes, JSON content), confirms job success, and validates workflow structure. Good test isolation via temporary files and git worktrees. Clear naming and organization. GAPS: missing edge cases (empty configs with only includes, all-excluded combinations, special characters, stress tests), minimal inline comments, some assertions could be more thorough (e.g., JSON structure validation beyond content checks). Missing 'all jobs succeeded' validation detail. Overall would catch most regressions in core functionality and GitHub Actions integration but might miss subtle edge-case failures.
